_comment: Classification of Azure RBAC roles at subscription scope. 'strong' = built-in roles that grant broad control (incl. Contributor), plus any role whose actions include a wildcard-style or Microsoft.Authorization grant. 'role_granting' = the narrower set of roles that can assign OTHER roles (write role assignments) - the actual privilege-escalation primitive (Owner and User Access Administrator; Contributor deliberately excluded as it cannot assign roles), used for the standing-privileged-assignment check.
